static Pass * createPass (AnalysisID ID)

Detailed Description

ModulePass class - This class is used to implement unstructured interprocedural optimizations and analyses. ModulePasses may do anything they want to the program.

Definition at line 236 of file Pass.h.

◆ runOnModule()

virtual bool llvm::ModulePass::runOnModule ( Module & M)
pure virtual

runOnModule - Virtual method overriden by subclasses to process the module being operated on.

Implemented in llvm::CallGraphWrapperPass, llvm::DOTGraphTraitsModulePrinter< AnalysisT, IsSimple, GraphT, AnalysisGraphTraitsT >, llvm::DOTGraphTraitsModuleViewer< AnalysisT, IsSimple, GraphT, AnalysisGraphTraitsT >, llvm::ForwardControlFlowIntegrity, llvm::FPPassManager, llvm::ImmutablePass, llvm::JumpInstrTables, llvm::Mips16HardFloat, and llvm::MipsOs16.
